name: chain__how_i_optimized_scheduling_for_a_local_
method: how i optimized scheduling for a local service gig. what's up, 21m studying ai. in the world of "boring" businesses like landscaping or cleaning, tech can be your secret weapon. i once built a custom

stages.task: Scrape Google Maps + Yelp for landscaping/cleaning/pressure washing businesses in target metros. Extract: name, phone, website, review count, has_online_booking flag
Score each business: phone-only booking = HIGH pain, basic website with no scheduling = MED, already uses Jobber/Housecall Pro = SKIP. Filter to HIGH/MED only
Find owner email via website/LinkedIn. Send personalized cold email showing their specific scheduling gap + link to demo page built for their business type
Track replies, schedule demos, convert to $99-199/mo scheduling app subscription
